title: Finn Meets the Savanna Friends
synopsis: Little Finn explores the warm savanna and meets friendly animals including a gentle elephant, a tall giraffe, and a striped zebra, learning simple animal sounds and movements.

pages.text: Finn walks in the warm savanna. The grass is tall and golden.

illustration.description: A toddler boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes walking through tall golden grass in an African savanna painted with thick gouache brushstrokes, warm orange and yellow colors, textured painterly style with bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Finn walking through golden savanna grass

pages.text: Look! A big gray elephant says 'TRUMPET!' Finn waves hello.

illustration.description: A large gray elephant with expressive eyes painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes, standing near a toddler boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, warm savanna colors with orange sunset in background, textured painterly style

pages.text: A tall giraffe stretches his long neck. 'Hello up there!' says Finn.

illustration.description: A very tall giraffe with brown spots bending down toward a small toddler boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, painted with thick gouache brushstrokes in warm savanna colors, golden grass and orange sunset, bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Finn looking up at a tall giraffe

pages.text: Zebra has black and white stripes. Zebra says 'NEIGH!' Finn laughs and claps.

illustration.description: A zebra with bold black and white stripes painted in expressive gouache style with thick brushstrokes, next to a happy toddler boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes clapping his hands, warm savanna colors with textured painterly background
illustration.alt: Finn clapping at a striped zebra

pages.text: The sun is orange and warm. Finn waves goodbye to all his new animal friends.

illustration.description: A toddler boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes waving goodbye with elephant, giraffe, and zebra in background, painted with thick gouache brushstrokes, warm orange sunset, golden grass, textured painterly style with bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Finn waving goodbye to savanna animals at sunset

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What sound does the elephant make?
questions.explanation: The elephant says 'TRUMPET!' in the story.

questions.question: Which animal has black and white stripes?
questions.explanation: The zebra has black and white stripes.

questions.question: What color is the grass in the savanna?
questions.explanation: The grass is described as tall and golden.
